steps.title: Use the rectangle area formula
steps.content: For a rectangle, area equals length times width. Here, the area is $560$ square inches and the length is $80$ inches, so set up $560=80w$.

steps.title: Use the area formula to find width
steps.content:
For a rectangle, area equals length times width. We have area = 560 and length = 80, so:
$$560 = 80 \times w$$
Divide both sides by 80:
$$w = \frac{560}{80} = 7$$
The width is 7 inches. That matches the correct answer - A is correct.
